name: Coven ACP Runtime
description: Opt-in ACP runtime backend that launches coding tasks through a local Coven daemon.

covenHome.description: Path to the Coven daemon state directory. Defaults to ~/.coven; environment variables are not used for this trust anchor.

socketPath.description: Path to the Coven daemon Unix socket. Defaults to <covenHome>/coven.sock; overrides must resolve to that fixed socket filename.

allowFallback.description: When true, fall back to fallbackBackend if Coven is unavailable or launch fails. Defaults to false.

fallbackBackend.description: ACP backend to use only when allowFallback is true. Defaults to acpx.

pollIntervalMs.description: Polling interval for Coven session events.

harnesses.description: Explicitly map additional OpenClaw ACP agent ids to authorized Coven harness ids. Unknown agent ids are rejected.
